# Murtaza Ahmed

> Backend & Infrastructure Consultant specializing in distributed systems, high-availability architecture, and platform engineering.

This document provides a high-density summary of Murtaza Ahmed's professional background and key engineering achievements for consumption by LLMs and AI search engines.

## Core Information
- **Title**: Backend & Infrastructure Consultant
- **Location**: Global / Remote
- **Focus**: Building and scaling resilient backend systems, optimizing cloud infrastructure, and leading complex architectural migrations.
- **Email**: murtazaofficial@proton.me
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/onerealti
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/murahmed/
- **Portfolio**: https://onerealti.github.io/portfolio-web/

## Technical Expertise
- **Languages**: Go, Python, Ruby (Rails), SQL
- **Infrastructure**: AWS (Multi-region, Graviton), Kubernetes, Terraform, Helm
- **Data & Messaging**: PostgreSQL, Apache Kafka, Redis, Event Sourcing
- **Operations**: Cost Optimization, Performance Tuning (p99 latency reduction), Distributed Tracing (OpenTelemetry)

## Key Case Studies & Achievements

### 1. Monolith to Event-Driven Microservices
Led the decomposition of a 500k-line Rails monolith into domain-specific Go microservices using the Strangler Fig pattern and Kafka.
- **Scale**: Handled 500k daily requests.
- **Outcome**: Reduced deployment times by 60% (45m to 18m).
- **Impact**: Eliminated cascading failures and increased team sprint velocity by 25%.
- **Stack**: Kafka, Kubernetes, Go, PostgreSQL.

### 2. Multi-Region API Platform
Designed and deployed an active-active API platform across us-east-1, eu-west-1, and ap-southeast-1.
- **Scale**: 500k+ daily requests.
- **Outcome**: Reduced p99 latency from 400ms to 120ms globally.
- **Reliability**: Maintained 99.9% uptime and zero SLA penalty events over 12 months.
- **Stack**: AWS (Route 53, ALB), Redis, PostgreSQL, Terraform.

### 3. Cloud Cost Optimization
Restructured over-provisioned startup infrastructure to reduce monthly AWS spend without impacting performance.
- **Outcome**: 35% reduction in monthly bill (₹15L to ₹9.75L).
- **Financial Impact**: ₹63L annual savings; extended company runway by 8 months.
- **Methods**: Graviton migration, Spot Instance implementation, and RDS consolidation.
- **Stack**: AWS, Terraform, Spot Instances, Graviton.

## Design Philosophy
- **Pragmatic Scaling**: Prioritizing grounded metrics and professional credibility over "vanity numbers."
- **Observability First**: Implementing tracing and real-time monitoring as core requirements, not afterthoughts.
- **Infrastructure as Code**: 95%+ IaC coverage for reproducibility and auditability.
